title: Spain expose England's flaws in heavy defeat that 'hurts'
summary: England suffered their heaviest loss to Spain in 17 years, marking a significant setback in their World Cup preparations. The defeat exposed defensive weaknesses that the team must address before the tournament. However, there remains time for the team to recover and improve.
content: England just needed to avoid defeat against Spain - instead they suffered their heaviest loss in 17 years, but it is not time to panic yet.

zh.title: 西班牙暴露英格兰防线漏洞，英格兰惨败"令人失望"
zh.summary: 英格兰遭遇17年来对西班牙最惨烈的失败，这标志着他们世界杯准备中的重大挫折。这场失利暴露了球队必须在比赛前解决的防守弱点。然而，球队仍有时间恢复并改进。

title: Fifa clarifies water bottle stadium rule
summary: FIFA has reversed course on its ban of reusable water bottles in World Cup stadiums, now allowing sealed disposable bottles following public backlash. This clarification addresses fan concerns about accessibility and sustainability during the tournament. The policy change came after the initial decision sparked widespread criticism.
content: Fifa says fans will be able to bring sealed disposable water bottles into World Cup stadiums following criticism over a decision to ban reusable bottles.

zh.title: FIFA澄清世界杯球场饮水瓶规则
zh.summary: FIFA改变了对世界杯球场内可重复使用水瓶的禁令，在公众反对后现在允许密封一次性水瓶。这一澄清解决了球迷对赛事期间可及性和可持续性的担忧。这一政策变化是在最初决定引发广泛批评后做出的。

title: How England can still qualify for the Women's World Cup
summary: With one round of group matches remaining in European qualifying, England, Wales, Scotland, and Northern Ireland are competing for spots at the Women's World Cup. Each nation's path to qualification varies based on their current group standings and remaining fixtures. The final round of matches will determine which Home Nations advance.
content: England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland are all vying for places at the Women's World Cup - but how can they get there with one round of group games left in European qualifying?

zh.title: 英格兰如何仍能晋级女子世界杯
zh.summary: 在欧洲预选赛还剩一轮小组赛的情况下，英格兰、威尔士、苏格兰和北爱尔兰正在争夺女子世界杯的参赛名额。每个国家的晋级之路因其目前的小组排名和剩余对手而异。最后一轮比赛将决定哪些主页国家晋级。

title: Germany forward Karl ruled out of World Cup
summary: Germany has lost forward Lennart Karl to a thigh injury that will keep him sidelined for the 2026 World Cup. The injury is a significant blow to Germany's attacking options ahead of the tournament. Karl's absence means the team will need to adjust their squad plans.
content: Germany forward Lennart Karl is ruled out of the 2026 World Cup with a thigh injury.

zh.title: 德国前锋卡尔被排除在世界杯外
zh.summary: 德国失去了前锋伦纳特·卡尔，他因大腿伤势将缺席2026年世界杯。这次伤势对德国在比赛前的进攻选择是一个重大打击。卡尔的缺席意味着球队需要调整他们的阵容计划。

title: Republic of Ireland have nothing to lose against France - Barrett
summary: Republic of Ireland striker Amber Barrett has expressed determination ahead of a crucial World Cup qualifier against France, where victory would secure automatic qualification. Barrett emphasized the team's commitment to giving maximum effort in the high-stakes match. The upcoming fixture represents a golden opportunity for Ireland to guarantee their place.
content: Republic of Ireland striker Amber Barrett says the side "are going to give everything we have" during Tuesday's match against France when they have the chance to secure automatic qualification for the World Cup.

zh.title: 爱尔兰共和国对法国没有什么可失去的 - 巴雷特
zh.summary: 爱尔兰共和国前锋琥珀·巴雷特在对阵法国的关键世界杯预选赛前表达了决心，胜利将确保自动晋级。巴雷特强调了球队在这场高风险比赛中全力以赴的承诺。即将到来的比赛对爱尔兰来说是保证他们晋级的黄金机会。

title: Advantage Scotland as they await Cuthbert injury news
summary: Scotland maintains the top spot in their World Cup qualifying group ahead of Belgium on goal difference, but their position is uncertain due to a potential serious injury to midfielder Erin Cuthbert. The injury to their key player could significantly impact their qualifying campaign. The team awaits assessment of the damage sustained.
content: Scotland stay top of their World Cup qualifying group on goal difference from Belgium amid fears of a serious injury to key midfielder Erin Cuthbert.

zh.title: 苏格兰获得优势，等待卡斯伯特伤情消息
zh.summary: 苏格兰以进球差领先比利时，在他们的世界杯预选组中保持榜首位置，但由于中场球员埃琳·卡斯伯特可能严重受伤，他们的位置不确定。这位关键球员的伤势可能会严重影响他们的预选赛活动。球队正在等待对所受伤害的评估。

title: 'Absolute madness' - Callaghan fumes at call to not give Turkey red card
summary: Turkey's controversial 2-1 victory over Northern Ireland saw striker Busem Seker escape a red card for a handball incident before later scoring the winning goal. Former Northern Ireland captain Marissa Callaghan criticized the refereeing decision, saying the player should have been sent off. The questionable call potentially cost Northern Ireland a crucial result.
content: Former Northern Ireland captain Marissa Callaghan says that Turkey striker Busem Seker "had to be sent off" after she controversially handled the ball before later scoring the winner during their 2-1 victory over Michael McArdle's side.

zh.title: "绝对疯狂"——卡拉汉对不给土耳其队红牌的判罚感到愤怒
zh.summary: 土耳其以争议的2:1战胜北爱尔兰，前锋布塞姆·塞克在手球事件中逃脱红牌处罚，之后还进了制胜球。北爱尔兰前队长玛丽莎·卡拉汉批评了裁判的判罚，认为该球员应该被罚出场。这个有问题的判罚可能让北爱尔兰失去了一个重要的结果。

title: Football Daily
summary: Football Daily features analysis of England's heavy defeat to Spain, with presenters Katie Smith, Fran Kirby, and Vicki Sparks discussing the implications. The episode examines what went wrong for England in the match. Expert reaction provides perspective on the team's performance and World Cup prospects.
content: Katie Smith is joined by Fran Kirby & Vicki Sparks reacting to England's defeat in Spain.

zh.title: 足球每日
zh.summary: 足球每日节目对英格兰对西班牙的惨败进行了分析，主持人凯蒂·史密斯、弗兰·柯比和维姬·斯帕克斯讨论了其影响。该集节目深入探讨了英格兰在比赛中出了什么问题。专家评论为球队的表现和世界杯前景提供了观点。

title: Watch: Weir hat-trick as Scotland thump Israel
summary: Scotland delivered a dominant performance against Israel in World Cup qualifying, winning 6-0 with captain Caroline Weir scoring a hat-trick. The emphatic victory demonstrates Scotland's attacking strength in their qualifying campaign. The result boosts Scotland's qualification prospects heading into the final stages of European qualifying.
content: Watch as Scotland thump Israel 6-0 in World Cup qualifying Group B4, with captain Caroline Weir scoring a hat-trick.

zh.title: 观看：韦尔帽子戏法，苏格兰大胜以色列
zh.summary: 苏格兰在世界杯预选赛中对以色列表现出色，以6:0的比分获胜，队长卡洛琳·韦尔打进帽子戏法。这场决定性的胜利展现了苏格兰在预选赛中的进攻实力。这个结果提升了苏格兰进入欧洲预选赛最后阶段前的出线前景。

title: Will transfers be a distraction for England at World Cup?
summary: England faces potential complications as their World Cup campaign unfolds during a hectic summer transfer window. The timing raises questions about whether player movements and negotiations could distract the team from tournament preparations. The article examines whether squad instability could impact performance on the pitch.
content: England's World Cup campaign is also in the middle of a busy summer transfer window, but how much of a distraction is it?

zh.title: 转会会否影响英格兰世界杯表现?
zh.summary: 英格兰在激烈的夏季转会窗口期间展开世界杯运动，可能面临复杂情况。球员流动和谈判的时机引发疑问，是否会分散球队对赛事准备的注意力。文章探讨球队阵容不稳定是否会影响场上表现。

title: Real Madrid plan Olise bid - Saturday's gossip
summary: Real Madrid are preparing a £130 million bid for Bayern Munich winger Michael Olise as transfer activity intensifies across Europe's top clubs. In other news, newly sacked Liverpool manager Arne Slot has rejected a move to Fulham, while Newcastle United are close to completing their first summer signing. The gossip column highlights the busy summer transfer window.
content: Real Madrid are lining up a £130m move for Bayern Munich winger Michael Olise, Arne Slot turns down Fulham after being sacked by Liverpool, Newcastle United are close to making their first summer signing, plus more.

zh.title: 皇家马德里计划竞购奥利塞 - 周六转会流言
zh.summary: 皇家马德里正准备为拜仁慕尼黑边锋迈克尔·奥利塞出价1.3亿英镑，欧洲顶级俱乐部的转会活动正在加剧。新近被解雇的利物浦主教练阿尔内·斯洛特拒绝了加入富勒姆，而纽卡斯尔联队即将完成首笔夏季签约。这个八卦栏目突出了繁忙的转会期。

title: Tuchel will not let Tampa pitch affect selection
summary: England manager Thomas Tuchel has dismissed concerns about pitch conditions at the venue for a friendly against New Zealand, stating it will not affect his team selection. Tuchel's stance indicates confidence that England can handle whatever ground conditions they encounter. The comments suggest his focus remains on preparation and squad rotation.
content: England head coach Thomas Tuchel says reports about the state of the pitch at the venue for his side's friendly against New Zealand will not influence team selection.

zh.title: 图赫尔不会让坦帕球场影响选人
zh.summary: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图赫尔已驳回对友谊赛球场条件的担忧，称这不会影响他的球队选人。图赫尔的立场表明英格兰有信心应对任何地面条件。这些评论表明他的重点仍在准备和球队轮换上。

title: Wales 'not good enough' in Montenegro - Wilkinson
summary: Wales failed to build on their chances against Montenegro, with a late goal from Jasna Djokovic denying them victory in a disappointing display. The dropped points represent a missed opportunity in their World Cup qualifying campaign. The outcome reflects frustration at Wales's inability to convert their dominance into a positive result.
content: Having been denied a second goal, Wales were left with red faces when Jasna Djokovic levelled late on.

zh.title: 威尔士在黑山"表现不够好" - 威尔金森
zh.summary: 威尔士未能充分利用对黑山的机会，杰斯娜·卓科维奇的后期进球使他们无法取胜，表现令人失望。这个丢分代表他们在世界杯预选赛中的一个重要机会错失。这个结果反映了威尔士对他们无法将压倒性优势转化为积极成果的沮丧感。

title: Mowbray returns as Blackburn head coach
summary: Tony Mowbray has returned to Blackburn Rovers as head coach for his second spell in charge of the club. The appointment marks Mowbray's return after previously managing the club earlier in his career. The move aims to provide stability and experience to Blackburn's management following their previous coach's departure.
content: Blackburn Rovers appoint Tony Mowbray as their new head coach for a second spell in charge.

zh.title: 莫布雷回归担任布莱克本主教练
zh.summary: 托尼·莫布雷回到布莱克本流浪者队担任主教练，开始他在该俱乐部的第二个任期。这次任命标志着莫布雷在职业生涯早期管理该俱乐部后的重返。此举旨在为布莱克本管理层在前任教练离职后提供稳定性和经验。

title: Highlights: Wales held to draw in Montenegro
summary: Montenegro and Wales drew in a Women's World Cup qualifying match in Podgorica. The result represents important progress for both nations in their qualification campaigns.
content: Watch highlights as Montenegro and Wales draw in Podgorica in Women's World Cup qualifying.

zh.title: 亮点：威尔士在黑山与对手战平
zh.summary: 黑山队和威尔士队在波德戈里察进行的女子世界杯预选赛中战成平手。这一结果对两国的资格赛竞争活动都具有重要意义。

title: Bayern Munich interested in Liverpool winger Ngumoha
summary: Bayern Munich has expressed interest in signing Liverpool's 17-year-old winger Rio Ngumoha. The young talent has become a target for the German club's development strategy.
content: Bayern Munich are interested in signing Liverpool's 17-year-old winger Rio Ngumoha.

zh.title: 拜仁慕尼黑对利物浦边锋恩古莫哈感兴趣
zh.summary: 拜仁慕尼黑表示对签下利物浦17岁边锋里奥·恩古莫哈感兴趣。这位年轻天才已成为这家德国俱乐部发展战略的目标。

title: Group says ex-Spurs boss Levy has sold 24.99% Enic stake
summary: Former Tottenham executive chairman Daniel Levy has reportedly sold a 24.99% stake in Enic, the club's parent company. This reduces his personal stake to 4.89%, representing a significant shift in the club's ownership structure.
content: Former Tottenham executive chairman Daniel Levy reportedly sells 24.99% stake in the club's parent company Enic, reducing his stake to 4.89%

zh.title: 集团表示前热刺主管列维已出售24.99%的Enic股份
zh.summary: 前热刺执行董事长丹尼尔·列维据称已出售了俱乐部母公司Enic的24.99%股份。这使他的个人股份减少至4.89%，代表了俱乐部所有权结构的重大变化。

title: Stockport County appoint Rochdale boss McNulty
summary: Stockport County have appointed Rochdale manager Jim McNulty as their new manager on a three-year contract. McNulty brings his managerial experience from his recent role at Rochdale.
content: Stockport County appoint Rochdale boss Jim McNulty as their new manager on a three-year deal.

zh.title: 斯托克港郡聘请罗奇代尔主帅麦克尼尔蒂
zh.summary: 斯托克港郡已聘请罗奇代尔经理吉姆·麦克尼尔蒂担任新主教练，合同为期三年。麦克尼尔蒂带来了他在罗奇代尔的丰富管理经验。

title: O'Neill set to stay on as Celtic manager
summary: Martin O'Neill will remain as Celtic manager after leading the club to a domestic double, winning both the Premiership and Scottish Cup. His successful campaign has secured his position with the club.
content: Martin O'Neill will continue as Celtic manager after leading the side to a Premiership and Scottish Cup double.

zh.title: 奥尼尔将继续担任凯尔特人主教练
zh.summary: 马丁·奥尼尔将继续担任凯尔特人主教练，他领导球队赢得国内双冠，同时获得英超联赛和苏格兰杯。他成功的执教确保了他在俱乐部的地位。

title: Bellamy urges Wales to dominate Romania
summary: Head coach Craig Bellamy wants Wales to dominate in an upcoming friendly match against Romania in Bucharest on Saturday. The team seeks to improve its record in away friendly matches.
content: Head coach Craig Bellamy wants Wales team to try to dominate in Saturday's friendly against Romania in Bucharest.

zh.title: 贝拉米敦促威尔士统治罗马尼亚
zh.summary: 主教练克雷格·贝拉米希望威尔士在周六布加勒斯特与罗马尼亚的友谊赛中占据主导地位。该队寻求改善其客场友谊赛的战绩。

title: Why is Fifa giving clubs $355m during the World Cup?
summary: FIFA is distributing $355 million among clubs that have players participating in the 2026 World Cup. This compensation recognizes the financial impact on clubs whose players compete in the tournament.
content: BBC Sport's Ask Me Anything team explains why clubs are being given a share of $355m by Fifa for having players involved in the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 国际足联为什么在世界杯期间向俱乐部提供3.55亿美元?
zh.summary: 国际足联正在向拥有参加2026年世界杯的球员的俱乐部分配3.55亿美元。这笔补偿承认了世界杯对这些俱乐部的财务影响。

title: Bellamy's Hagi pain as Wales boss eyes improvement
summary: Craig Bellamy, now Wales manager, reflects on the impact Romanian icon Gheorghe Hagi had on him as a schoolboy before Wales' friendly against Romania. He aims to improve Wales' historically poor record in away friendlies.
content: Craig Bellamy recalls the impact Romania icon Gheorghe Hagi had on his beloved Wales when he was a schoolboy as he bids to improve his side's miserable record in away friendlies.

zh.title: 贝拉米对哈吉的遗憾之痛，威尔士主教练期待进步
zh.summary: 现任威尔士主教练克雷格·贝拉米回顾了罗马尼亚足球传奇人物格奥尔基·哈吉在他少年时期对他的影响。在威尔士即将与罗马尼亚进行友谊赛之前，他的目标是改善威尔士在客场友谊赛中的糟糕战绩。

title: More than the Score
summary: Messi, Ronaldo, Mbappé and Yamal are preparing for the 2026 World Cup, which will be the largest men's World Cup tournament ever held. These elite players will compete for championship glory at the expanded event.
content: Messi, Ronaldo, Mbappé and Yamal prepare to compete at the biggest men's World Cup ever

zh.title: 不仅仅是比分
zh.summary: 梅西、罗纳尔多、姆巴佩和亚马尔正在为2026年世界杯做准备，这将是历史上规模最大的男子世界杯赛事。这些精英球员将在这项扩大规模的赛事中争夺冠军荣誉。

title: How thunderstorms and lightning could impact games at World Cup
summary: Several 2026 World Cup host cities are located in peak thunderstorm season, creating potential for match disruptions. Lightning and severe weather in these locations could significantly impact World Cup games.
content: With several host cities in peak thunderstorm season there is a high chance that some World Cup games could be disrupted. Here is how and why.

zh.title: 雷暴和闪电如何可能影响世界杯比赛
zh.summary: 几个2026年世界杯举办城市位于雷暴高发季节，存在比赛中断的可能性。这些地点的闪电和恶劣天气可能对世界杯比赛产生重大影响。

title: Europe's youngest manager on Arteta and leaving Arsenal for Parma
summary: Carlos Cuesta, Europe's youngest manager, discusses his experience as an assistant at Arsenal before taking the head coach position at Parma. He reflects on his transition from working under Arteta to leading his own club.
content: Carlos Cuesta discusses his time as assistant manager at Arsenal and becoming Europe's youngest manager at Parma.

zh.title: 欧洲最年轻的主教练谈阿尔特塔和离开阿森纳加入帕玛
zh.summary: 欧洲最年轻的主教练卡洛斯·库埃斯塔讨论了他在阿森纳担任助理教练的经历，随后获得帕玛的主教练职位。他反思了自己从效力于阿尔特塔到领导自己球队的过渡。

title: Former Spurs boss Frank will not rush return to management
summary: Former Tottenham boss Thomas Frank says it 'does not feel like the right time' to return to management immediately following his exit. He is taking time to consider his next steps in the sport.
content: Former Tottenham boss Thomas Frank says it "does not feel like the right time" to go back into management yet.

zh.title: 前热刺主帅弗兰克不会匆忙回归管理岗位
zh.summary: 前热刺主帅托马斯·弗兰克表示，退出后立即回归管理岗位"感觉不像是合适的时机"。他正在花时间考虑自己在这项运动中的下一步行动。

title: Football Daily
summary: John Murray, Ian Dennis & Ali Bruce-Ball answer viewer questions ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The panel provides insights and discussion on World Cup-related topics and developments.
content: John Murray, Ian Dennis & Ali Bruce-Ball answer questions ahead of the FIFA World Cup.

zh.title: 足球每日
zh.summary: 约翰·默里、伊恩·丹尼斯和阿里·布鲁斯-博尔在2026年国际足联世界杯前回答观众提问。该小组提供了关于世界杯相关话题和发展的见解和讨论。

title: FIFA cancels WCup tickets given free by mistake
summary: About 60 fans had their free World Cup tickets canceled after FIFA discovered they were mistakenly issued due to a website error. The cancellations represent a technical correction to prevent unauthorized ticket distribution.
content: FIFA has canceled World Cup tickets issued to about 60 fans who mistakenly got them for free because of a website error.

zh.title: FIFA取消误发的世界杯免费门票
zh.summary: 约60名球迷的免费世界杯门票被取消，FIFA发现这些门票因网站错误而被误发。此次取消代表了防止非法售票的技术纠正。

title: City chairman 'wants to' talk about 115 charges
summary: Manchester City chairman Khaldoon Al-Mubarak says he has things to discuss about the club's legal dispute with the Premier League over 115 charges, but plans to wait until a verdict is rendered. The statement suggests significant comments pending resolution.
content: Manchester City chairman Khaldoon Al-Mubarak has things he "wants to say" about the club's legal fight with the Premier League, but insists it will have to wait until a verdict is delivered.

zh.title: 城市主席"想要"讨论115项指控
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特城主席哈尔登·阿尔-穆巴拉克表示，他对俱乐部与英超联赛关于115项指控的法律纠纷有话要说，但计划等待判决后再发表。该声明暗示重大评论待决议。

title: Spurs sign Andy Robertson on free transfer
summary: Tottenham completed the transfer of Andy Robertson from Liverpool on a free transfer. Robertson's move comes after his contract expired with the Merseyside club.
content: Tottenham have completed the signing of Andy Robertson on a free transfer following his departure from Liverpool, the north London club has confirmed.

zh.title: 热刺以自由转会方式签下罗伯逊
zh.summary: 托特纳姆热刺完成了从利物浦以自由转会方式签下安迪·罗伯逊的交易。罗伯逊的转会发生在他与默西塞德郡俱乐部的合同到期之后。

title: Mourinho takes Türkiye to court over sanctions
summary: José Mourinho filed a complaint with the European Court of Human Rights against Turkey regarding disciplinary sanctions imposed by the country's football federation during his tenure at Fenerbahce. The legal action challenges how the sanctions were administered.
content: José Mourinho filed a complaint with the European Courts of Human Rights (ECHR) against Türkiye regarding how the disciplinary sanctions were handed down by the country's football federation while he was in charge of Fenerbahce.

zh.title: 穆里尼奥就制裁事宜向土耳其提起诉讼
zh.summary: 何塞·穆里尼奥向欧洲人权法院提出投诉，反对土耳其针对他在费内巴切执教期间由该国足球协会实施的纪律制裁。该法律诉讼质疑这些制裁的实施方式。

title: Fernandes set for award double with PFA nom.
summary: Bruno Fernandes has been nominated for the 2026 PFA Player of the Year award, putting him on track to win multiple prestigious honors this year. His nomination adds to his growing list of accolades.
content: Bruno Fernandes is on course to seal a prestigious award double after being shortlisted for the 2026 PFA Player of the Year prize.

zh.title: 费尔南德斯获PFA提名，奖项双丰收在即
zh.summary: 布鲁诺·费尔南德斯获得2026年PFA年度最佳球员奖提名，有望在今年赢得多个享有盛誉的荣誉。他的提名增加了他不断增长的荣誉列表。

title: 5k to 5 million? NZ's Payne thanks influencer
